subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Do Thou assist them that love Thee and seek Thy presence. Verily they have arrived, O my God, upon the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی فانصر من احبک و اراد وجهک انه قد ورد یا الهی فی شاطی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @spiritual transformation
